entrance.name: Dungeon Entrance
entrance.description: You stand at the entrance to an ancient dungeon. Moss creeps across crumbling stone walls. A faint draft carries the smell of earth and something else — adventure, perhaps.

hallway.name: Long Hallway
hallway.description: A long corridor of dark stone stretches before you. Faded tapestries line the walls, their images long since rotted away. Your footsteps echo ominously.

armory.name: Ancient Armory
armory.description: Racks of rusted weapons line the walls. Most are beyond use, but something might still be salvageable. The smell of old iron hangs in the air.

throne_room.name: Throne Room
throne_room.description: A grand hall with vaulted ceilings. A crumbling throne sits on a raised dais at the far end. Dust motes drift in a single shaft of pale light from above.

item_descriptions.torch: A wooden torch, still dry enough to light.
item_descriptions.old_key: A heavy iron key, green with age. What does it open?
item_descriptions.rusty_sword: The blade is pitted with rust but still holds an edge.
item_descriptions.cracked_shield: A round shield, cracked down the middle. Better than nothing.
item_descriptions.golden_crown: A crown of tarnished gold. Heavy and ornate.
item_descriptions.mysterious_scroll: A rolled parchment bound with a black ribbon. The writing is in a language you almost recognize.
